papers.name: Paper 1A Multiple Choice
papers.coverage_notes: SL core and HL-common content only; no AHL-only content. Data booklet required.

papers.name: Paper 1B Data-based Questions
papers.coverage_notes: SL core and HL-common content only; data analysis and experimental techniques. Data booklet required.

papers.name: Paper 2 Structured Questions
papers.coverage_notes: SL core and HL-common content only; short-answer and extended-response. Data booklet required.

papers.name: Paper 1A Multiple Choice
papers.coverage_notes: All SL/HL and AHL content. Data booklet required.

papers.name: Paper 1B Data-based Questions
papers.coverage_notes: All SL/HL and AHL content; data analysis and experimental techniques. Data booklet required.

papers.name: Paper 2 Structured Questions
papers.coverage_notes: All SL/HL and AHL content; short-answer and extended-response. Data booklet required.

internal_assessment.name: Scientific investigation
internal_assessment.duration_notes: 10 hours recommended; internally assessed and externally moderated.
internal_assessment.coverage_notes: AO1-AO4; not part of external paper topic classification.

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge of: terminology, facts and concepts; skills, techniques and methodologies.

assessment_objectives.name: Understand and apply knowledge
assessment_objectives.description: Understand and apply knowledge of: terminology and concepts; skills, techniques and methodologies.

assessment_objectives.name: Analyse, evaluate and synthesize
assessment_objectives.description: Analyse, evaluate, and synthesize: experimental procedures; primary and secondary data; trends, patterns and predictions.

assessment_objectives.name: Investigative skills
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate the application of skills necessary to carry out insightful and ethical investigations.

ao_component_mapping.notes: AO1-AO3 are assessed in Paper 1 and Paper 2. AO1-AO4 are assessed in the scientific investigation. Paper 1 and Paper 2 each approximately 50% AO1+AO2 and 50% AO3.

difficulty_ladder.description: single concept recall or direct application (e.g., state a definition, balance a simple equation)
multi-step application within one topic (e.g., calculate enthalpy change from calorimetry data, determine molecular shape using VSEPR)
cross-topic reasoning or exam-style synthesis (e.g., combine equilibrium, acid-base and organic mechanism reasoning; AHL-only multi-step problem)

lesson_use.notes: v1 skill supports classification and qbank routing only. Teacher/student/parent modes are not enabled.

exclude_from_questions: pre-DP science topics not in the DP syllabus
AP Chemistry framework-specific language not used by IB
AHL-only content when target level is SL

level_scope_rules.SL_HL_only: content assessed at both SL and HL
level_scope_rules.SL_HL_plus_AHL: SL/HL common content plus additional HL-only content; AHL part must be tagged separately
level_scope_rules.AHL_only: content assessed only at HL; classify as out_of_scope for SL

marking_guidance.notes: Command terms and data booklet reference are defined in the subject guide. Use generated marking guidance only; do not copy official mark schemes.
